title: rorippa islandica var. glabra
intro: Rorippa islandica var. glabra, also known as the smooth watercress, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and skin irritations. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and other nutrients, providing several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving eye health, and supporting cardiovascular health. Smooth watercress can be consumed as a raw herb, used in teas, or as an ingredient in salves and creams for its medicinal properties.
